name: Smoked Salmon Bites with Lemon Balm on Pumper
recipeIngredient: Pumpernickel bread, cut into squares (4 per slice)
4 ounces cream cheese at room temperature
Quarter pound Canadian smoked salmon, thinly sliced
Small red onion, thinly sliced in rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread pumpernickel squares with butter.
2. Blend lemon balm with lemon juice, salt, pepper, and cream cheese.
3. Spread mixture evenly onto the buttered squares.
4. Place a small piece of salmon on top of each square.
5. Add a red onion ring to each piece.
6. Arrange on serving platter and garnish with lemon slices and lemon balm sprigs.
Variation: Use chopped chives or dill instead of lemon balm.
